quests.title: Slime Trouble
quests.description: Clear the slimes from the valley.

quests.title: Bat Patrol
quests.description: Spooky bats have moved in. Shoo them away!

entities.name: Bramble
dialogue: Oh! A traveler! Welcome to the Warren.
I'm SO hungry... could you find me 3 crunchy carrots?
dialogueInProgress: Any luck finding those carrots? I'm still peckish!
They grow here and there around the valley.
dialogueComplete: You found all three carrots? You're a lifesaver!
Munch munch... delicious. Thank you, friend!

entities.name: Pip
dialogue: Bawk! Those slimes are everywhere lately.

dialogue.text: Could you clear a few out?

dialogueInProgress: Bawk! Keep at it - those slimes won't bonk themselves!
dialogueComplete: Bawk bawk! The valley's safer already. You're my hero!

entities.name: Hazel
dialogue: Hello there! I'm Hazel, the village healer.
Those red berries restore health when you eat them.

dialogue.text: Could you gather 3 for the village?

dialogueInProgress: Still looking for berries? They grow near the water and trees.
Pop one anytime - they'll heal you up!
dialogueComplete: Three berries - wonderful! The village thanks you.

entities.name: Coop
dialogue: Bawk! Those bats keep swooping at my feathers!

dialogue.text: Could you shoo 2 of them off?

dialogueInProgress: Bawk! Still a couple of bats flapping about.
dialogueComplete: Bawk bawk! No more bats. My feathers thank you!

entities.name: Maple
dialogue: Ahh, a brave young rabbit. I am Maple, elder of the valley.
Defeat the monsters that trouble us and you'll be a true hero.
dialogueInProgress: Keep clearing the slimes and bats, brave one.
The valley is counting on you.
dialogueComplete: You've done it! the Warren is safe once more.
You are forever a Hero of the Valley. Thank you.
